creator: rajil.s@gmail.com
text:
On Arch linux, the system was complaining for the IR firmware like so

[15574.729053] hdpvr 1-4:1.0: firmware version 0x1e dated Mar  7 2012 08:25:15
[15575.062260] lirc_dev: IR Remote Control driver registered, major 240
[15575.068218] lirc_zilog: module is from the staging directory, the quality is unknown, you have been warned.
[15575.068221] lirc_zilog: module is from the staging directory, the quality is unknown, you have been warned.
[15575.069236] Zilog/Hauppauge IR driver initializing
[15575.072471] probing IR Rx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7)
[15575.072558] probe of IR Rx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7) done. Waiting on IR Tx.
[15575.072569] i2c i2c-7: probe of IR Rx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7) done
[15575.072621] probing IR Tx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7)
[15575.072684] i2c i2c-7: Direct firmware load for haup-ir-blaster.bin failed with error -2
[15575.072690] i2c i2c-7: firmware haup-ir-blaster.bin not available (-2)
[15575.072882] i2c i2c-7: lirc_dev: driver lirc_zilog registered at minor = 0
[15575.072888] i2c i2c-7: IR unit on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7) registered as lirc0 and ready
[15575.072893] i2c i2c-7: probe of IR Tx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7) done
[15575.072960] initialization complete
[15575.128863] hdpvr 1-4:1.0: device now attached to video1
[15575.128998] usbcore: registered new interface driver hdpvr


After copying the firmware file haup-ir-blaster.bin in /lib/firmware, it loaded up fine.


[15912.847927] usb 1-4: USB disconnect, device number 14
[15912.848104] hdpvr 1-4:1.0: device video1 disconnected
[15919.788022] usb 1-4: new high-speed USB device number 15 using xhci_hcd
[15920.038005] hdpvr 1-4:1.0: firmware version 0x1e dated Mar  7 2012 08:25:15
[15920.341026] probing IR Rx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7)
[15920.341169] probe of IR Rx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7) done. Waiting on IR Tx.
[15920.341181] i2c i2c-7: probe of IR Rx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7) done
[15920.341302] probing IR Tx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7)
[15920.342490] i2c i2c-7: lirc_dev: driver lirc_zilog registered at minor = 0
[15920.342498] i2c i2c-7: IR unit on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7) registered as lirc0 and ready
[15920.342504] i2c i2c-7: probe of IR Tx on Hauppage HD PVR I2C (i2c-7) done
[15920.423303] hdpvr 1-4:1.0: device now attached to video1
